testcase.name: test_change_stack
testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/changestacktest.py:30: in test_change_stack self.assertEqual("3", myfile.read()) E AssertionError: '3' != '1' E - 3 E + 1

testcase.name: test_completing_global_variables

failure.message: AssertionError: 'global' != 'local' - global ? - ^ + local ? ^ : proposal <my_global> has wrong scope, expected 'global', got 'local'

testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/codeassisttest.py:65: in test_completing_global_variables self.assert_completion_in_result("my_global", "global", result) ropetest/contrib/codeassisttest.py:39: in assert_completion_in_result self.assertEqual( E AssertionError: 'global' != 'local' E - global E ? - ^ E + local E ? ^ E : proposal <my_global> has wrong scope, expected 'global', got 'local'

testcase.name: test_get_calltips_for_classes
testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/codeassisttest.py:1045: in test_get_calltips_for_classes self.assertEqual("C.__init__(self)", doc) E AssertionError: 'C.__init__(self)' != 'C(...)' E - C.__init__(self) E + C(...)

testcase.name: test_assist_on_relative_imports
testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/codeassisttest.py:1505: in test_assist_on_relative_imports self.assert_completion_in_result("a_func", "imported", result) ropetest/contrib/codeassisttest.py:1358: in assert_completion_in_result self.fail("completion <%s> not proposed" % name) E AssertionError: completion <a_func> not proposed

testcase.name: test_completing_after_dot
testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/codeassisttest.py:1444: in test_completing_after_dot self.assert_completion_in_result("sample_method", "attribute", result) ropetest/contrib/codeassisttest.py:1358: in assert_completion_in_result self.fail("completion <%s> not proposed" % name) E AssertionError: completion <sample_method> not proposed

testcase.name: test_bad_attributes
testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/finderrorstest.py:52: in test_bad_attributes self.assertEqual(1, len(result)) E AssertionError: 1 != 0

testcase.name: test_defined_later
testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/finderrorstest.py:30: in test_defined_later self.assertEqual(1, len(result)) E AssertionError: 1 != 0

testcase.name: test_trivial_find_definition
testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/findittest.py:133: in test_trivial_find_definition self.assertEqual(start, result.offset) E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'offset'

testcase.name: test_trivial_find_implementations

failure.message:
AssertionError: Lists differ: [] != [Location('mod1.py', (21, 22))]
Second list contains 1 additional elements. First extra element 0: Location('mod1.py', (21, 22))
- [] + [Location('mod1.py', (21, 22))]

testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/findittest.py:88: in test_trivial_find_implementations self.assertEqual([], result) E AssertionError: Lists differ: [] != [Location('mod1.py', (21, 22))] E E Second list contains 1 additional elements. E First extra element 0: E Location('mod1.py', (21, 22)) E E - [] E + [Location('mod1.py', (21, 22))]

testcase.name: test_fixing_contents
testcase.failure:
ropetest/contrib/fixmodnamestest.py:39: in test_fixing_contents self.assertEqual("import _od2
", newmod1.read()) E AssertionError: 'import _od2
' != 'import xod2
' E - import _od2 E ? ^ E + import xod2 E ? ^

testcase.name: test_handling_nested_modules
testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/fixmodnamestest.py:46: in test_handling_nested_modules self.assertFalse(pkg.exists()) E AssertionError: True is not false

testcase.name: test_packages_module_renaming
testcase.failure: ropetest/contrib/fixmodnamestest.py:28: in test_packages_module_renaming self.assertFalse(pkg.exists()) E AssertionError: True is not false

testcase.name: test_moving_files_to_folders
testcase.failure: ropetest/historytest.py:36: in test_moving_files_to_folders self.assertEqual("", my_file.read()) ../solution/rope/base/resources.py:107: in read raw = self.read_bytes() ../solution/rope/base/resources.py:102: in read_bytes return self.project.fscommands.read(self.real_path) ../solution/rope/base/fscommands.py:34: in read with open(path, "rb") as handle: E IsADirectoryError: [Errno 21] Is a directory: '/var/folders/8v/2v0n4gpd503fy6q0_lyh18gh0000gn/T/ropetest-run-e0gtjc5_/project-tlcfnf_j/sample_project/my_file.txt'
